channel.title: Engineering-Culture on norbix.dev - The log of my journey through code & software systems architecture
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering-Culture on norbix.dev - The log of my journey through code & software systems architecture

item.title: The Boy Scout Rule in Software Engineering: Leave It Better Than You Found It
item.description: Small improvements compound. Learn how the Boy Scout Rule transforms messy codebases into maintainable systems—without big rewrites.
